periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 71. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

periods.name: Thursday
periods.short_forecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of rain showers between noon and 2pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny. High near 83, with temperatures falling to around 74 in the afternoon. East wind 5 to 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

periods.name: Thursday Night
periods.short_forecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 7pm and 10pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 10pm and 11pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Cloudy, with a low around 63. Northeast wind 12 to 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

periods.name: Friday
periods.detailed_forecast: Rain showers likely. Cloudy, with a high near 67. Northeast wind 12 to 17 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
